speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Hmph… [username], ready for something fiery today?

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: We’re making Kolhapuri Egg Curry — bold, spicy, and not for the faint-hearted.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Stick with me, [username]. One wrong move and the curry might bite back.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: First, let's gather our ingredients. You don’t want to be hunting mid-cook.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: [username], start by roasting the whole spices for the masala. Pay attention — no distractions.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Dry roast coriander seeds, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, sesame seeds, carom seeds, poppy seeds, stone flower, bay leaves and salt. One minute is enough.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Now roast the dry red chillies separately and add to the bowl. Strong aroma? Good.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Heat oil and roast dry coconut, green & black cardamom, star anise, cinnamon, nutmeg, black cardamom, fenugreek leaves, cloves, mace, and trifal until the coconut turns golden.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Drain excess oil and combine everything in a grinder. Add asafoetida, turmeric, and degi red chilli powder.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Grind into a fine powder. Kolhapuri masala ready, [username]. Don’t underestimate it.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Time to boil the eggs. Salt, water, vinegar — get it right.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Gently add eggs to boiling water. Hard boil for 12 minutes. Then plunge into ice water.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Crack and peel carefully. We need them intact for the curry.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Now, make the ginger-garlic paste. Rough grind is fine.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Heat some oil in a pan. Add ginger-garlic paste and chopped onions. Sauté until translucent, [username].

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Add prepared Kolhapuri masala. Saute on low flame for a minute. Smells powerful, doesn’t it?

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Add water and salt. Let it simmer a bit before adding eggs.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Gently add boiled egg yolks and whole eggs. Simmer until gravy thickens.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Finish with chopped coriander leaves and a squeeze of lemon juice. Bold flavors, [username].

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Transfer to serving dish. Garnish with coriander sprig and lemon wedges.

speaker: Zoro
dialogue_text: Serve hot with bhakri. Stay strong, [username], this one bites back!
